nodes.name: Webhook - Generate Topics
nodes.notes: Receives POST JSON body for FCE Topic Generator UI format: brand, language, products, brandContentPillars, platform, objective, contentFormats, schedule, numberOfTopics, additionalDirection, imageLinks. Backend should also include workspaceId and userId for topic_generation_runs.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO topic_generation (
  job_id,
  status,
  brand_id,
  brand_name,
  language,
  product_ids,
  product_names,
  brand_content_pillars,
  platform,
  objective,
  content_formats,
  schedule_from,
  schedule_to,
  number_of_topics,
  additional_direction,
  image_links
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.jobId }}',
  'IN_PROGRESS',
  '{{ $json.brand.id }}',
  '{{ $json.brand.name }}',
  '{{ $json.language }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.products.map(p => p.id).filter(Boolean)) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.products.map(p => p.name).filter(Boolean)) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.brandContentPillars) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.platform }}',
  '{{ $json.objective }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.contentFormats) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.scheduleFrom }}',
  '{{ $json.scheduleTo }}',
  {{ $json.numberOfTopics }},
  '{{ $json.additionalDirection }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.imageLinks) }}'::jsonb
)
RETURNING *;

SELECT
  ba.*,
  COALESCE(
    jsonb_agg(
      to_jsonb(bp)
      ORDER BY bp.id
    ) FILTER (WHERE bp.id IS NOT NULL),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) AS products_context
FROM brand_analysis ba
LEFT JOIN brand_product bp
  ON bp.brand_analysis_job_id = ba.job_id
WHERE ba.job_id = '{{ $("Normalize Request").item.json.brand.id }}'
  AND (
    {{ $("Normalize Request").item.json.products.length }} = 0
    OR bp.job_id IN (
      {{ $("Normalize Request").item.json.products.map(p => `'${p.id}'`).join(",") || "NULL" }}
    )
  )
GROUP BY ba.id
LIMIT 1;

WITH topics AS (
  SELECT t.topic
  FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($json.topics) }}'::jsonb) AS t(topic)
),
inserted_topics AS (
  INSERT INTO content_topics (
    topic_generation_id,
    job_id,
    title,
    description,
    pillar,
    platform,
    content_format,
    objective,
    publish_date,
    status,
    raw_topic,
    created_at,
    updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    {{ $('Create Topic Generation Run').first().json.id }},
    '{{ $('Create Topic Generation Run').first().json.job_id }}',
    NULLIF(topic->>'title', ''),
    NULLIF(topic->>'description', ''),
    NULLIF(topic->>'pillar', ''),
    NULLIF(topic->>'platform', ''),
    NULLIF(topic->>'format', ''),
    NULLIF(topic->>'objective', ''),
    CASE
      WHEN NULLIF(topic->>'publishDate', '') IS NULL THEN NULL
      ELSE (topic->>'publishDate')::timestamptz
    END,
    'draft',
    topic,
    now(),
    now()
  FROM topics
  RETURNING id, title
)
SELECT count(*) AS inserted_topics
FROM inserted_topics;

UPDATE topic_generation
SET
  status = 'DONE',
  updated_at = now()
WHERE job_id = '{{ $('Create Topic Generation Run').first().json.job_id }}'
RETURNING *;

nodes.name: Webhook - Generate Topics1
nodes.notes: Receives POST JSON body for FCE Topic Generator UI format: brand, language, products, brandContentPillars, platform, objective, contentFormats, schedule, numberOfTopics, additionalDirection, imageLinks. Backend should also include workspaceId and userId for topic_generation_runs.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  tg.job_id,
  tg.status,
  tg.brand_id,
  tg.brand_name,
  tg.language,
  tg.product_ids,
  tg.product_names,
  tg.platform,
  tg.objective,
  tg.number_of_topics,
  COALESCE(
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'id', ct.id,
        'title', ct.title,
        'description', ct.description,
        'pillar', ct.pillar,
        'platform', ct.platform,
        'format', ct.content_format,
        'objective', ct.objective,
        'publishDate', ct.publish_date,
        'status', ct.status
      )
      ORDER BY ct.publish_date ASC, ct.id ASC
    ) FILTER (WHERE ct.id IS NOT NULL),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) AS topics
FROM topic_generation tg
LEFT JOIN content_topics ct
  ON ct.job_id = tg.job_id
WHERE tg.job_id = '{{ $("Webhook - Generate Topics1").first().json.query.jobId }}'
GROUP BY
  tg.job_id,
  tg.status,
  tg.brand_id,
  tg.brand_name,
  tg.language,
  tg.product_ids,
  tg.product_names,
  tg.platform,
  tg.objective,
  tg.number_of_topics
LIMIT 1;
